chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ مَنْ عَفَّ عَنْ حَرَمِ النَّاسِ عُفَّ عَنْ حَرَمِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 185 – The one restrains from the sanctity of the people, his sanctity would be restrained from

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/403)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/403)
text: أَ مَا يَخْشَى الَّذِينَ يَنْظُرُونَ فِي أَدْبَارِ النِّسَاءِ أَنْ يُبْتَلَوْا بِذَلِكَ فِي نِسَائِهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Those who do not fear looking at the behinds of the women, they would be afflicted with that regarding their own womenfolk’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Do you not fear, when looking at women’s behind, for your women being looked in the same way.’”
